text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title and is published in ICML 2020 (Proceedings of the 37th International Conference on Machine Learning, pp. 9036–9045). The cited authors — Sivaprasad, Mai, Vogels, Jaggi, and Fleuret — exactly match the official author list on arXiv, PMLR, and EPFL Infoscience; the automated checker's "6 correct" flag appears to be a metadata parsing artifact (institutional affiliations were conflated with author names).
LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v119/sivaprasad20a.html
